stemHtml: An aeroplane is flying from Thessaloniki/Makedonia (LGTS) to Kavala/Megas Alexandros (LGKV) airports within Greece. Which of the following documents / publications must the Commander check, in order to be familiar with any published Noise Abatement Departure Procedures (NADP) for the departure aerodrome?

options.c: Section LGTS AD 2.21 of the Greek AIP.
